rules.rule_text:
rule db_structure
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a = "CREATE TABLE" nocase
		$b = "INSERT INTO" nocase
		$c = "VALUES" nocase
		$d = "ENGINE" nocase
		$e = "CHARSET" nocase
		$f = "NOT NULL" nocase
		$g = "varchar" nocase
		$h = "PRIMARY KEY"

	condition:
		5 of them
}
